Metadata.title: dictus -- 100% Offline Voice Dictation for iOS & Android
Metadata.description: Voice dictation keyboard that works entirely on your device. No data sent to the internet.
Metadata.jsonld_description: Fully offline voice dictation keyboard with real-time on-device transcription.

Features.privacy_desc: No data ever leaves your device. Your voice is transcribed locally, with no server and no cloud.
Features.keyboard_desc: Works as a third-party keyboard in every app. Messages, notes, emails — everywhere.
Features.opensource_desc: Transparent and auditable code. You can verify for yourself that no data leaks.
Features.smart_desc: Intelligent reformulation with pre-configured templates via on-device AI.
Features.vocab_desc: Personal dictionary of technical terms for medical, legal, dev, and business jargon.
Features.history_desc: Local journal of past dictations with full-text search.
Features.audio_desc: Import audio files and transcribe them locally with Whisper.

HowItWorks.step1_desc: Start dictation from any app with a single tap.
HowItWorks.step2_desc: Your voice is processed locally by an embedded model. No internet needed.
HowItWorks.step3_desc: Your words are transcribed instantly. Accurate, fast, private.
HowItWorks.privacy_desc: Your voice is captured by the mic, transcribed by an on-device model, and the text is inserted. Everything happens on your device.
HowItWorks.privacy_accent: No cloud. No server. Just your device.

OpenSource.title: Transparent by nature
OpenSource.desc: Dictus is open source. Every line of code is public and auditable. Trust isn’t claimed, it’s verified.

Community.title: Join the community
Community.desc: Follow development, suggest ideas, and connect with other users.

Footer.privacy: This site and Dictus collect zero personal data. No cookies, no analytics, no tracking.

Privacy.meta_description: Dictus collects no data. Privacy policy for the app and website.
Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: Dictus collects no data. Your voice is processed entirely on your device — no voice data, no transcribed text, and no keystrokes ever leave your device.
Privacy.scope: This policy covers the Dictus app and the getdictus.com website.
Privacy.data_collection_text: Dictus collects no personal data. Your voice is processed on-device via WhisperKit (CoreML). No analytics, no tracking, no cookies.
Privacy.full_access_text: The iOS keyboard Full Access permission is required solely for microphone access. Dictus does not read the clipboard, log keystrokes, or transmit any data over the network.
Privacy.data_usage_text: No data usage — nothing is collected.
Privacy.third_party_text: No third-party SDKs, analytics services, ad networks, or cloud infrastructure.
Privacy.data_retention_text: User preferences and ML model files are stored locally only. No server-side storage. Uninstalling the app removes everything.
Privacy.user_rights_text: No personal data to access, export, or delete. Uninstalling the app removes all local data.
Privacy.children_text: No data is collected from any user, including children under 13.
Privacy.security_text: All processing happens on-device. No servers, no databases, no user accounts. No network transmission of user content.
Privacy.changes_text: Updates will be posted on this page with a revised date.

Support.meta_description: Contact the Dictus team for questions or support.
Support.title: Support
Support.intro: Need help with Dictus? Here’s how to reach us.
Support.github_text: Report a bug or suggest an improvement on our GitHub repository.
Support.telegram_text: Join our community to discuss Dictus.
Support.compatibility_text: Dictus requires iOS 18+ (iPhone) — Android support coming soon.
